proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with npm1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with npm1_mutation=0.
Patients with complex_karyotype=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with complex_karyotype=0.
Patients with secondary_aml=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with secondary_aml=0.

Within flt3_itd=1 patients, those receiving treatment_gilteritinib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than flt3_itd=1 patients with treatment_gilteritinib=0.
There is a positive interaction between flt3_itd and treatment_midostaurin on objective_response in a logistic regression (interaction term coefficient > 0).
There is a positive interaction between flt3_itd and treatment_gilteritinib on objective_response in a logistic regression (interaction term coefficient > 0).

prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with a lower objective_response rate.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, secondary_aml, complex_karyotype, tp53_mutation, and the six treatments, idh1_mutation remains positively associated with objective_response (refines h5).
After the same adjustment, npm1_mutation is associated with objective_response with a positive coefficient (refines h2).
After the same adjustment, complex_karyotype is associated with objective_response with a negative coefficient (refines h3).
After the same adjustment, tp53_mutation is associated with objective_response with a negative coefficient (refines h1).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a final multivariable logistic regression (objective_response ~ idh1_mutation + age_years + sex_female + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + unfit_for_intensive + treatment_ivosidenib + treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine + treatment_7plus3 + treatment_midostaurin + treatment_gilteritinib + treatment_enasidenib), idh1_mutation has a positive coefficient (i.e., higher response).
In the same final multivariable model, ecog_ps has a coefficient with a sign matching the iter-7 univariable result.
In the same final multivariable model, age_years has a coefficient with a sign matching the iter-7 univariable result.
